chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-335 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Katcha Peshi. 2. For hearing of MA 4837/16 14.12.2016. Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Khoso, Advocate for respondent No.3. -.-.-. None present for the petitioner nor there is any intimation for such an absence. Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Khoso, the learned Counsel for respondent No.3, has pointed out the last order of 23.11.2016. Today, no definite statement has been made on behalf of petitioner, as directed in the last order and that is why a fixed date and time was fixed. Consequently, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE
